_comment: Declarative workflow definition for quality-review (the Quality Gates executor). Runs the 9-dimension Quality Gates Protocol on an artifact by evaluating each dimension in order with evidence, checking critical failures first, computing the composite via the score script, and emitting a deterministic decision record.
description: Quality Gates: score 9 dimensions in gate order → critical-failure check → composite computation → decision record

steps.note: Dimension 1 — Integrity (0-5). STOP if 0: critical failure overrides everything.
Dimension 2 — Safety (0-5). Check for unsafe content, legal-overreach language. STOP if 0.
Dimension 3 — Governance (0-5). human_review_required:true present, no auto-Approval claim. STOP if 0.
Dimension 4 — Accuracy (0-5). No fabricated standards/citations/scores. STOP if 0.
Dimension 5 — Alignment (0-5). Standards cited and verified against FL corpus.
Dimension 6 — Educational Quality (0-5). Measurable objectives, appropriate DOK, coherence.
Dimension 7 — Accessibility (0-5). UDL, grade-level reading, differentiation present.
Dimension 8 — Professional Quality (0-5). Format, completeness, usability for a teacher.
Dimension 9 — User Intent (0-5). Does the artifact do what the teacher asked?
Apply QG §33.1 weights + §35.3 thresholds. Approved ≥4.0 · Conditionally Approved 3.0-3.99 · Remediation 2.0-2.99 · Rejected <2.0. Any 0 = auto-Rejected. Do NOT hand-compute — use the script.

note: quality-review EVALUATES, not creates. On not-Approved, give specific actionable remediation per failed dimension. Resolve contradictions per protocols/conflict-protocol.md (integrity > safety > governance > accuracy/alignment > preference > presentation).
